findings.description: Weak cipher suite detected: DES
findings.suggestion: Remove weak cipher DES. Use strong ciphers like AES-GCM, ChaCha20-Poly1305.

findings.description: Error object logged directly - may contain sensitive data or stack traces
findings.suggestion: Log only safe error properties (message, code). Sanitize error messages before displaying to users. Never expose stack traces in production.

findings.description: Backend error message or stack trace exposed to user
findings.suggestion: Use generic error messages for users. Log detailed errors server-side only. Never expose stack traces or backend errors.

findings.description: Math.random() used for security-sensitive random value generation
findings.suggestion: Use expo-random or crypto.getRandomValues() for cryptographically secure random values. Math.random() is not cryptographically secure.

findings.description: Math.random() used for security-sensitive random value generation
findings.suggestion: Use expo-random or crypto.getRandomValues() for cryptographically secure random values. Math.random() is not cryptographically secure.

findings.description: SSL certificate validation disabled: rejectUnauthorized=false
findings.suggestion: Enable certificate validation and implement certificate pinning for production environments

findings.description: SSL certificate validation disabled: rejectUnauthorized=false
findings.suggestion: Enable certificate validation and implement certificate pinning for production environments

findings.description: axios request without timeout configuration
findings.suggestion: Add timeout to axios config: { timeout: 30000 } to prevent hanging requests.

findings.description: Hardcoded IP address in private network URL: 192.168.1.2
findings.suggestion: Wrap development IP addresses in __DEV__ check to prevent them from being included in production builds.

findings.description: fetch() without timeout configuration
findings.suggestion: Add timeout using AbortSignal: const controller = new AbortController(); setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 30000);

findings.description: axios request without timeout configuration
findings.suggestion: Add timeout to axios config: { timeout: 30000 } to prevent hanging requests.

findings.description: axios request without timeout configuration
findings.suggestion: Add timeout to axios config: { timeout: 30000 } to prevent hanging requests.

findings.description: fetch() without timeout - vulnerable to slowloris DoS
findings.suggestion: Add timeout to fetch using AbortSignal with setTimeout, or use a library like axios with timeout config.

findings.description: fetch() without timeout configuration
findings.suggestion: Add timeout using AbortSignal: const controller = new AbortController(); setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 30000);

findings.description: JSON.parse() on potentially untrusted data without validation
findings.suggestion: Validate JSON structure and data types before parsing untrusted input. Use schema validation libraries like Zod or Yup.

findings.description: JSON.parse() on potentially untrusted data without validation
findings.suggestion: Validate JSON structure and data types before parsing untrusted input. Use schema validation libraries like Zod or Yup.

findings.description: Catch block shows raw error message to user - may expose sensitive backend details
findings.suggestion: Replace with user-friendly generic messages. Example: "An error occurred. Please try again." Log details securely.

findings.description: Axios has a NO_PROXY Hostname Normalization Bypass that Leads to SSRF (high)
findings.suggestion: Fix available - run npm audit fix. Check: npm audit for details.

findings.description: Vulnerability in bcrypt (high)
findings.snippet:
"dependencies": {
    "@types/nodemailer": "^8.0.0",
    "bcrypt": "^5.0.0",
    "bcryptjs": "^3.0.3",
    "cors": "^2.8.6",
findings.suggestion: Fix available - run npm audit fix. Check: npm audit for details.
